title: brachypodium peruvianum
intro: Brachypodium peruvianum, also known as Queñua or Queñua Andina, is a type of grass native to the Andean region in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium peruvianum include the ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Brachypodium peruvianum include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
